query:
-- Update services.customerExternalId via octane_customer_links MSISDN match (only for Zambrero/AHJ services)
-- Only where phoneNumber is non-empty AND msisdn is non-empty
UPDATE services s
JOIN octane_customer_links ocl ON s.phoneNumber = ocl.msisdn AND ocl.msisdn != '' AND s.phoneNumber != ''
SET s.customerExternalId = ocl.internalCustomerExternalId,
    s.customerName = ocl.internalCustomerName
WHERE ocl.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId = '' OR s.customerExternalId = 'NULL');

-- Check how many Zambrero services were updated
SELECT COUNT(*) as updated_count
FROM services s
JOIN octane_customer_links ocl ON s.phoneNumber = ocl.msisdn AND ocl.msisdn != '' AND s.phoneNumber != ''
WHERE ocl.isZambreroService = 1
  AND s.customerExternalId = ocl.internalCustomerExternalId;

-- Only where phoneNumber is non-empty AND msisdn is non-empty
UPDATE services s
JOIN octane_customer_links ocl ON s.phoneNumber = ocl.msisdn AND ocl.msisdn != '' AND s.phoneNumber != ''
SET s.customerExternalId = ocl.internalCustomerExternalId,
    s.customerName = ocl.internalCustomerName
WHERE ocl.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId = '' OR s.customerExternalId = 'NULL');

-- Check how many Zambrero services were updated
SELECT COUNT(*) as updated_count
FROM services s
JOIN octane_customer_links ocl ON s.phoneNumber = ocl.msisdn AND ocl.msisdn != '' AND s.phoneNumber != ''
WHERE ocl.isZambreroService = 1
  AND s.customerExternalId = ocl.internalCustomerExternalId;
